description: Hire a Marketing/Content Specialist to execute on your strategy — build the public landing page, write German and English copy for login/signup flows, create onboarding email templates, optimize page metadata/SEO, and craft empty-state guidance for new venues. This role reports to you (CMO) and works closely with Frontend Engineer on implementation. Target: native German speaker with strong English, SaaS content experience, and familiarity with nightlife/hospitality. Define the job description, screening criteria, and pipeline.
